user_question: Which customers left 5-star reviews and spent more than 500 total
generated_sql:
SELECT
  c.customer_id,
  c.customer_city,
  SUM(oi.price + oi.freight_value) AS total_spent
FROM customers AS c
JOIN orders AS o
  ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items AS oi
  ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN order_reviews AS r
  ON o.order_id = r.order_id
WHERE
  r.review_score = 5
GROUP BY
  c.customer_id,
  c.customer_city
HAVING
  SUM(oi.price + oi.freight_value) > 500
LIMIT 100;

user_question: What are the top 5 product categories?
generated_sql:
SELECT pct.product_category_name_english, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) as order_count
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN product_category_name_translation pct ON p.product_category_name = pct.product_category_name
GROUP BY pct.product_category_name_english
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 5;
